entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A diverse collection of 359 advanced inbred lines used for stress tolerance improvement

entities.name: CIMMYT
entities.description: International Maize and Wheat Improvement Center, a source of breeding programs

entities.name: IITA
entities.description: International Institute for Tropical Agriculture, a source of breeding programs

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An environmental stress condition for which maize lines were bred

entities.name: LOW N
entities.description: Low nitrogen availability, an environmental stress condition

entities.name: SOIL ACIDITY
entities.description: Soil acidity (SA), an environmental stress condition

entities.name: PEST AND DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of maize lines to resist pests and diseases

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: 1260 single nucleotide polymorphism markers used for genotyping the maize panel

entities.name: MODEL-BASED POPULATION PARTITION
entities.description: A method used to classify maize lines into subgroups based on genotypic data

entities.name: NEIGHBOR-JOINING CLUSTERING
entities.description: A method used to classify maize lines into subgroups based on genotypic data

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to classify maize lines into subgroups based on genotypic data

entities.name: LA POSTA SEQUÍA
entities.description: A specific subgroup of maize lines that consistently separated from others

entities.name: SNP HAPLOTYPE DATA
entities.description: Genotypic data used to separate the La Posta Sequía subgroup

entities.name: PEDIGREE
entities.description: Ancestry information used for clustering and determining subsets of maize lines

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: Information used to determine subsets of maize lines

entities.name: BREEDING SCHEME
entities.description: Information used to determine subsets of maize lines

entities.name: AMOVA
entities.description: Analysis of molecular variance used to reveal variation within and among subsets

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: A measure of genetic variation tested in the whole panel and within subsets

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci, tested in the panel and subsets

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A method tested using SNP markers and phenotypic data to link genotypes to traits

entities.name: MINOR ALLELIC FREQUENCY
entities.description: A filter (MAF ≥ 0.05) used to select SNP markers for association mapping

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A phenotypic trait used as data for association mapping

entities.name: EARS PER PLANT
entities.description: A phenotypic trait used as data for association mapping

entities.name: ANTHESIS TO SILKING INTERVAL
entities.description: A phenotypic trait used as data for association mapping

entities.name: MIXED LINEAR MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model (Q + K) used to control type I error in association mapping

entities.name: HETEROTIC GROUP
entities.description: Genetic grouping information used for stress tolerance breeding

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: Information regarding adaptation to specific environments used for breeding

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The overall target trait for improvement in maize breeding
